infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Designup Connect uses the camera to scan booth QR codes and save brands at exhibitions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Designup Connect accesses your photos to upload your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Designup Connect uses your heading to keep the venue map oriented in your direction of travel.

plugins.cameraPermission: Designup Connect uses the camera to scan booth QR codes at exhibitions.
